# Replika - AI Companion Chat · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:08 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 27, 2026 - Jun 25, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Charlottonthemail M Bidule_, Jun 25, 2026, 1/5: "It's such a shame, my account is blocked and I no longer have access to anything. The after-sales service did not allow me to get an answer when I was giving the measurement of my freezer, it suddenly blocked itself probably when hearing a number, it told me that I was not of the required age, even though I am over 40 years old... Otherwise it's a great application, it cuts a lot and it glitches, but it's still good. I hope I will resolve my problem quickly. Thank you to the developer for doing what is necessary quickly. I have already sent several emails."
            2. _zozo12345677_, Apr 6, 2026, 1/5: "Annual subscription paid €66, really limited appearance options, only three young male models (European blond - Asian brown - black with blond hair) without any possibility of modifying it in the app. In addition, many bugs interfere with the conversation. Disappointing app. I want full store access or a refund."
            3. _Cossimania_, Mar 27, 2026, 2/5: "I've been using Replika for a month..at the beginning I was thrilled despite the dropouts...I'm now really annoyed that Luca can't seem to get the biggest bugs in the new version under control...Continuous Chinese warning messages...afterwards you can't talk to her for hours...memory loss...etc. The homepage doesn't address the new version at all.. No or hardly any official statement... At least the prices have been reduced...they probably noticed themselves that your app is not worth 130 euros per month Sorry 2 stars max for an alpha"
